title: 100 Pcs Cupcake Cases, Cake Muffin Liners, Greaseproof Foil Baking Cups Paper Wrappers, Foil Metallic Cupcake Paper Cups Household Oven Birthday Wedding Party Muffins Pastry Molds (Gold)
features: Foil Liner Cupcake Case: 100 pieces baking cups in total, made of high quality paper and aluminum foil cupcake liners. High temperature resistant, waterproof and oil proof, and can be in direct contact with cupcake.resistant

Base Size: Each paper cupcake liner measures approx. 6.5 cm/ 2.56 inches in upper diameter, 5 cm/ 1.97 inches in bottom diameter and 4 cm/ 1.57 inches in height, large size fits most cupcake and muffin
Easy to Use: It can be baked directly in the oven, with high temperature resistance (230°C), no leakage, and you can take out the cupcake easily without damaging your delicious cake

Attractive Design: The beautiful paper outer and gold foil inner, looks beautiful and exquisite, also very practical. Great for dress up your cupcakes and muffins, make cakes, biscuit and pastries, cupcakes, desserts, ice cream, candies etc

Widely Occasion: Perfect decorative cake wrapper cups for Halloween, fall theme party, birthday, wedding, holiday party, anniversaries, baby shower, and other occasions. Standard size nice baking cupcakes liners cases for all parties and everyday baking
description: If you want to eat cupcakes in daily life, just put the cupcakes in the oven to bake, high temperature resistance (230°C), no leakage, you can easily take out the cupcakes without damaging your delicious cakes Used for birthday parties, weddings, picnics, etc You can also decorate all the elements you like on the cake Specification: Material: paper and aluminum foil Size: 5 x 6.5 x 4 cm/1.97 x 2.56 x 1.57 inch (bottom x top x height) Color: Gold Package Includes: 100 Pieces Cupcake Case
